stories.title: Fix retro ceremony first-pass formula: attempts == 0 never matches accepted stories
stories.description: The retrospective ceremony computes first-pass rate using `attempts == 0`, but accepted stories always have `attempts >= 1` (the execute cycle increments attempts before the review cycle runs). This causes the ceremony to report 0% first-pass success even when every story in the sprint passed on the first review attempt. The formula should use `attempts == 1` (or `attempts <= 1`) to correctly identify genuine first-pass stories. Found in sprint 24 retro patch: all 11 stories had `attempts: 1` and were accepted, but ceremony reported 0% first-pass rate. Also: clean up stale backlog entries for KAIZEN-009a through KAIZEN-009e which were completed in sprint 24 but still show passes: false in backlog.json (plan ceremony did not update lifecycle status when pulling stories).
acceptanceCriteria: grep -n 'attempts' scripts/ralph/ceremonies/retro.md | grep -E '== 1' shows the first-pass condition uses attempts == 1 (not attempts == 0)

python3 -m py_compile scripts/ralph/ceremonies.py exits 0
stories.testPlan: grep -n 'attempts' scripts/ralph/ceremonies/retro.md to confirm the formula uses == 1; show the changed line. Then python3 -c "import json; b = json.load(open('prd/backlog.json')); print([s['id'] for s in b['stories'] if s['id'] in ['KAIZEN-009a','KAIZEN-009b','KAIZEN-009c','KAIZEN-009d','KAIZEN-009e']])" — must return []. Show all output verbatim.

smart.notes: Relevant score 4: ceremony metric fix does not advance feature delivery, but corrects misleading velocity reporting.

stories.title: Plan ceremony: always queue a pending increment stub when creating an active sprint
stories.description: GGE G5 fires every sprint because the plan ceremony creates an active increment but never queues a follow-on pending increment. The fix: at the end of the plan ceremony, if no increment has status='pending' in manifest.json, automatically append a minimal pending increment stub (id, name, description, status='pending', dependsOn current). This ensures GGE G5 never fires again and the planning pipeline is always primed.

shellcheck -S error scripts/ralph/ceremonies/*.sh exits 0 (if any .sh files are modified)
stories.returnedReason: Root cause of recurring GGE-G5 ANDON: plan ceremony does not queue a pending increment after creating an active sprint, so G5 fires every sprint cycle.
